description: Style NoteThese slip-on heel shoes from catwalk are perfect for party wear. Pop these on to jazz up your outfit when you're dressing to impress.Heel: 3.5"Product DescriptionBrown slip- on with synthetic upper with perforations, overlays and five-hole lace-upsPadded tongue and innerThick outsole with patterned grooves on the forefoot, brand badge on the midfoot and a heel with a heel capMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
